command: set -euo pipefail; if [ -f scripts/run_copy_env.sh ]; then source scripts/run_copy_env.sh >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; fi; if [ -f nexus_control_server/scripts/resolve_kb_ingest_password.sh ]; then source nexus_control_server/scripts/resolve_kb_ingest_password.sh; nexus_resolve_kb_ingest_password || true; fi; export KB_INGEST_PASSWORD="${KB_INGEST_PASSWORD:-123}"; cd agente_intermediario; if [ -x target/release/agente_intermediario ]; then exec target/release/agente_intermediario; else exec cargo run --release; fi

set -euo pipefail; if [ -f scripts/run_copy_env.sh ]; then source scripts/run_copy_env.sh >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; fi; export POSTGRES_USER=kb_ingest; export POSTGRES_INGEST_USER=kb_ingest; if [ -f nexus_control_server/scripts/resolve_kb_ingest_password.sh ]; then source nexus_control_server/scripts/resolve_kb_ingest_password.sh; nexus_resolve_kb_ingest_password || true; fi; export KB_INGEST_PASSWORD="${KB_INGEST_PASSWORD:-123}"; cd validador; if [ -x target/release/nexus_validador ]; then exec target/release/nexus_validador; elif [ -x target/release/validador ]; then exec target/release/validador; else exec cargo run --release; fi
